title: agrostis rigidula var. arisan-montana
intro: Agrostis rigidula var. arisan-montana is a variant of the Agrostis rigidula plant, commonly known as a species of grass. While I couldn't find any information on the medicinal properties and health benefits of Agrostis rigidula var. arisan-montana specifically, Agrostis species are generally used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant may be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, although I couldn't find any specific information on the herbal preparations for this variant. Further research is needed to fully understand the properties and uses of Agrostis rigidula var. arisan-montana.
